de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class AbstractSMTTranslator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractSMTTranslator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SMTTranslator
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    SimplifyTranslator, SmtLib2Translator, SmtLibTranslator

    public abstract class AbstractSMTTranslator
extends Object
implements SMTTranslator
    This abstract class provides a stubb for translation of KeY-Formulas to other standards. Formulas are translated in a correct, but not always complete representation of the target standard. Non-first-order elements in a formula are translated as uninterpreted predicates. The translation for standards supporting multiple sorts is oriented on the paper "The Boogie 2 Type System: Design and Verification Condition Generation" by Leino and Ruemmer.
    Author:
    Simon Greiner

      remember all function declarations

        Parameters:

      • translateProblem

        public final StringBuffer translateProblem(Term problem,
                            Services services,
                            SMTSettings settings)
                                    throws IllegalFormulaException
        Description copied from interface: SMTTranslator
        Translates a problem into the given syntax. The only difference to translate(Term t, Services services) is that assumptions will be added.
        Specified by:
        translateProblem in interface SMTTranslator
        Parameters:
        problem - the problem to be translated.
        Returns:
        a StringBuffer representing the term in the given syntax.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • getSingleFunctionDef

        private StringBuffer getSingleFunctionDef(StringBuffer funName,
                                ArrayList<Sort> sorts)
        Get the type predicate definition for a given function. If the result type is of some int type, empty StringBuffer is returned.
        Parameters:
        funName - the name of the function.
        sorts - the sorts, the function is defined for. Last element is the return type.
        Returns:
        well formed expression that defines the type of the function.

      • buildTranslatedFuncDecls

        Build the translated function declarations. Each element in the ArrayList represents (functionname | argType1 | ... | argTypen| resultType)
        Returns:
        structured List of declaration.

                                  throws IllegalFormulaException

        IllegalFormulaException

      • buildCompleteText

        protected abstract StringBuffer buildCompleteText(StringBuffer formula,
                             ArrayList<StringBuffer> assum,
                             ArrayList<ContextualBlock> assumptionBlocks,
                             ArrayList<ArrayList<StringBuffer>> functions,
                             ArrayList<ArrayList<StringBuffer>> predicates,
                             ArrayList<ContextualBlock> predicateBlocks,
                             ArrayList<StringBuffer> types,
                             SortHierarchy sortHierarchy,
                             SMTSettings settings)
        Build the text, that can be read by the final decider. If the assumptions should be added to the formula, add them like assumtions impliy formula.
        Parameters:
        formula - The formula, that was built out of the internal representation. It is built by ante implies succ.
        assum - Assumptions made in this logic. Set of formulas, that are assumed to be true.
        assumptionBlocks - List of ContextualBlocks, which refer to the position of different types of assumptions in the container assumptions. Use these objects to make detailed comments in the translations. For more information see the class ContextualBlock .
        functions - List of functions. Each Listelement is built up like (name | sort1 | ... | sortn | resultsort)
        predicates - List of predicates. Each Listelement is built up like (name | sort1 | ... | sortn)
        predicateBlocks - List of ContextualBlocks, which refer to the position of different types of predicate in the container predicates. Use these objects to make detailed comments in the translations. For more information see the class ContextualBlock .
        types - List of the used types.
        Returns:
        The Stringbuffer that can be read by the decider

      • isMultiSorted

        protected abstract boolean isMultiSorted()
        Returns, whether the Structure, this translator creates should be a Structure, that is multi sorted. If false, a single sorted structure is created. Then all sorts are translated as integers.
        Returns:
        true, if multi sorted logic is supported.

      • getIntegerSort

        protected abstract StringBuffer getIntegerSort()
        The String used for integer values. This sort is also used in single sorted logics.
        Returns:
        The String used for integers.

      • getBoolSort

        protected abstract StringBuffer getBoolSort()
        The String used for boolean values.
        Returns:
        The string used for boolean values.

      • translateLogicalNot

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalNot(StringBuffer arg)
        Build the Stringbuffer for a logical NOT.
        Parameters:
        arg - The Formula to be negated.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting Formular

      • translateLogicalAnd

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalAnd(StringBuffer arg1,
                               StringBuffer arg2)
        Build the logical konjunction.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first formula.
        arg2 - The second formula.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting formular.

      • translateLogicalOr

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalOr(StringBuffer arg1,
                              StringBuffer arg2)
        Build the logical disjunction.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first formula.
        arg2 - The second formula.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting formular.

      • translateLogicalImply

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalImply(StringBuffer arg1,
                                 StringBuffer arg2)
        Build the logical implication.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first formula.
        arg2 - The second formula.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting formular

      • translateLogicalEquivalence

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalEquivalence(StringBuffer arg1,
                                       StringBuffer arg2)
        Build the logical equivalence.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first formula.
        arg2 - The second formula.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting formular

      • translateLogicalAll

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalAll(StringBuffer var,
                               StringBuffer type,
                               StringBuffer form)
        Build the logical forall formula.
        Parameters:
        var - the bounded variable.
        type - the type of the bounded variable.
        form - The formula containing the bounded variable.
        Returns:
        The resulting formula.

      • translateLogicalExist

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalExist(StringBuffer var,
                                 StringBuffer type,
                                 StringBuffer form)
        Build the logical exists formula.
        Parameters:
        var - the bounded variable.
        type - the type of the bounded variable.
        form - The formula containing the bounded variable.
        Returns:
        The resulting formula.

      • translateLogicalTrue

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalTrue()
        Translate the logical true.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer the logical true value.

      • translateLogicalFalse

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalFalse()
        Translate the logical false.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer the logical false value.

      • translateObjectEqual

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateObjectEqual(StringBuffer arg1,
                                StringBuffer arg2)
        Build the Stringbuffer for an object equivalence.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first formula of the equivalence.
        arg2 - The second formula of the equivalence.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing teh resulting Formular

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalVar(StringBuffer name)

        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting Formular

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalConstant(StringBuffer name)
        Build the Stringbuffer for an constant.
        Returns:
        The StringBuffer representing the resulting Formular

                              ArrayList<StringBuffer> args)

        Parameters:
        name - The Symbol of the predicate.
        args - The arguments of the predicate.
        Returns:
        the formula representing the predicate.

        protected abstract StringBuffer translatePredicateName(StringBuffer name)
        Get the name for a predicate symbol.
        Parameters:
        name - The name that can be used to create the symbol.
        Returns:
        The unique predicate symbol.

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateFunction(StringBuffer name,
                             ArrayList<StringBuffer> args)
        Translate a function.
        Parameters:
        name - The Symbol of the function.
        args - The arguments of the function.
        Returns:
        the formula representing the function.

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateFunctionName(StringBuffer name)
        Get the name for a function symbol.
        Parameters:
        name - The name that can be used to create the symbol.
        Returns:

      • translateIntegerPlus

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerPlus(StringBuffer arg1,
                                StringBuffer arg2)
                                     throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the integer plus.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - first val of the sum.
        arg2 - second val of the sum.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the integer plus.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerMinus

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerMinus(StringBuffer arg1,
                                 StringBuffer arg2)
                                      throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the integer minus.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the substraction.
        arg2 - second val of the substraction.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the integer substraction.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerUnaryMinus

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerUnaryMinus(StringBuffer arg)
                                           throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate a unary minus.
        Parameters:
        arg - the argument of the unary minus.
        Returns:
        the formula representing tha unary minus function.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerMult

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerMult(StringBuffer arg1,
                                StringBuffer arg2)
                                     throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the integer multiplication.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the multiplication.
        arg2 - second val of the multiplication.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the integer multiplication.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerDiv

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerDiv(StringBuffer arg1,
                               StringBuffer arg2)
                                    throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the integer division. Override this, if integer division is supported.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the division.
        arg2 - second val of the division.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the integer division.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerMod

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerMod(StringBuffer arg1,
                               StringBuffer arg2)
                                    throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the integer modulo. Override this, if integer modulo is supported.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the modulo.
        arg2 - second val of the modulo.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the integer modulo.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerGt

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerGt(StringBuffer arg1,
                              StringBuffer arg2)
                                   throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the greater than. Override this, if integer greater is supported.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the greater than.
        arg2 - second val of the greater than.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the greater than.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerLt

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerLt(StringBuffer arg1,
                              StringBuffer arg2)
                                   throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the less than. Override this, if integer less is supported.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the less than.
        arg2 - second val of the less than.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the less than.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerGeq

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerGeq(StringBuffer arg1,
                               StringBuffer arg2)
                                    throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the greater or equal. Override this, if integer greater or equal is supported.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the greater or equal.
        arg2 - second val of the greater or equal.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the greater or equal.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateIntegerLeq

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerLeq(StringBuffer arg1,
                               StringBuffer arg2)
                                    throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the less or equal. Override this, if integer less or equal is supported.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - The first val of the less or equal.
        arg2 - second val of the less or equal.
        Returns:
        The formula representing the less or equal.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateNull

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateNull()
        Translate the NULL element
        Returns:
        the Stringbuffer used for nullelement

      • getNullName

        protected abstract StringBuffer getNullName()
        Returns:
        Returns the name of the NULL element.

      • translateNullSort

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateNullSort()
        Translate the NULL element's Sort.
        Returns:
        the StringBuffer used for Null.

      • translateSort

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateSort(String name,
                         boolean isIntVal)
        Translate a sort.
        Parameters:
        name - the sorts name
        isIntVal - true, if the sort should represent some kind of integer
        Returns:
        The String used for this sort. If Multisorted, used in declarations, else for the typepredicates.

      • translateIntegerValue

        protected StringBuffer translateIntegerValue(long val)
                                      throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate a sort. Return the StringBuffer, that should be displayed at definitionpart. i.e. the name used for typepredicates an similair. Override this, if integers are supported.
        Returns:
        the sorts name
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateLogicalIfThenElse

        protected abstract StringBuffer translateLogicalIfThenElse(StringBuffer cond,
                                      StringBuffer ifterm,
                                      StringBuffer elseterm)
        Translate the logical if_then_else construct. All attributes are logical formulas. If the underlying language does not support this contruct, it is equivalent with (cond IMPLIES ifterm) AND (NOT(cond) IMPLIES thenterm) and can be reduced to this.
        Parameters:
        cond - the condition term.
        ifterm - the formula used, if cond=true
        elseterm - the term used, if cond=false
        Returns:
        ther StringBuffer representing the if then else construct

      • translateTermIfThenElse

        protected StringBuffer translateTermIfThenElse(StringBuffer cond,
                                   StringBuffer ifterm,
                                   StringBuffer elseterm)
                                        throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate the if_then_else construct for terms (i.e. ifterm and condterm are not of Sort FORMULA) If this method is nor overriden, a default implementation is used. This might me less effective than a language supported translation. So, if allowed by the target language, override this.
        Parameters:
        cond - the condition formula
        ifterm - the term used if cond = true.
        elseterm - the term used if cond = false.
        Returns:
        the StringBuffer representing the if then else construct.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException - if this construct is not supported.

      • translateUniqueness

        protected StringBuffer translateUniqueness(AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper function,
                               Collection<AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper> distinct)
                                    throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translates the unique-property of a function.
        Parameters:
        function - the function itself
        distinct - the set of functions, that should be distinct.
        Returns:
        the translation of the unique function
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

        protected StringBuffer buildInjectiveFunctionAssumption(AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper fw)

      • translateTermIte

                            Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                            Services services)
                                     throws IllegalFormulaException
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • addConstantTypePredicate

        private void addConstantTypePredicate(Term term,
                            StringBuffer name)

      • translateTerm

        protected StringBuffer translateTerm(Term term,
                         Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                         Services services)
                              throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translates the given term into input syntax and adds the resulting string to the StringBuffer sb.
        Parameters:
        term - the Term which should be written in Simplify syntax
        quantifiedVars - a Vector containing all variables that have been bound in super-terms. It is only used for the translation of modulo terms, but must be looped through until we get there.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateAsBindingUninterpretedPredicate

        private StringBuffer translateAsBindingUninterpretedPredicate(Term term,
                                                    Function fun,
                                                    Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                                                    ImmutableArray<Term> subs,
                                                    Services services)
                                                       throws IllegalFormulaException
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateAsBindingUninterpretedFunction

        private StringBuffer translateAsBindingUninterpretedFunction(Term term,
                                                   Function fun,
                                                   Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                                                   ImmutableArray<Term> subs,
                                                   Services services)
                                                      throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translate an uninterpreted function, which binds variables
        Parameters:
        term - The term with the binding function on top level
        fun - the function operator
        quantifiedVars -
        subs - the subterms of the function
        services -
        Returns:
        A stringBuffer representing the translation of the function.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateAsUninterpretedFunction

        private StringBuffer translateAsUninterpretedFunction(Function fun,
                                            Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                                            ImmutableArray<Term> subs,
                                            Services services)
                                               throws IllegalFormulaException
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • isNumberSymbol

        private boolean isNumberSymbol(Services services,
                     Operator op)

      • isComplexMultiplication

        private boolean isComplexMultiplication(Services services,
                              Term t1,
                              Term t2)

      • castIfNeccessary

        private StringBuffer castIfNeccessary(StringBuffer formula,
                            Sort formulaSort,
                            Sort targetSort)
        This method adds a type cast to a translated formula, if neccessary. It is neccesary, if the formula is of some int sort, but some not-int sort is expected. In this case add the type cast. In general, it is also neccesary to add a type cast, if the formula has some non-int sort and some int sort is expected. But this should never happen, as ever possible translation is made with int-sort. A type-cast is never neccessary, if the translation can make use of multisort.
        Parameters:
        formula - The formula, that was translated.
        formulaSort - The sort, the translatet formula has.
        targetSort - The sort, the translated formula is expected to have.
        Returns:
        A stringBuffer containing a type cast, if neccessary.

      • cast

        private StringBuffer cast(StringBuffer formula)
        Cast a formula of type int to type u. This cast is only performed, if multisort is not suppoerted
        Parameters:
        formula - the formula to cast.
        Returns:
        the casted formula.

      • getModalityPredicate

        private StringBuffer getModalityPredicate(Term t,
                                Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                                Services services)
                                   throws IllegalFormulaException
        Get a predicate representing a modality. Make sure that equal modalities return the same predicate.
        Parameters:
        t - The term representing the modality.
        quantifiedVars - quantified variables.
        services - the services object to use.
        Returns:
        a unique predicate representing a modality.
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • addSpecialFunction

        private void addSpecialFunction(Function fun)
        Add an interpreted function to the set of special functions. Caution: If added here, make sure to handle the function in getSpecialSortPredicates()
        Parameters:
        fun - the interpreted function to be added.

      • getTypePredicate

        protected StringBuffer getTypePredicate(Sort s,
                            StringBuffer arg)
        Get the type predicate for the given sort and the given expression.
        Parameters:
        s - The sort, the type predicate is wanted for.
        arg - The expression, whose type should be defined.
        Returns:
        The well formed type predicate expression.

      • translateUnknown

        protected final StringBuffer translateUnknown(Term term,
                            Vector<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars,
                            Services services)
                                       throws IllegalFormulaException
        Takes care of sequent tree parts that were not matched in translate(term, skolemization). In this class it just produces a warning, nothing more. It is provided as a hook for subclasses.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term given to translate
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateVariable

        protected final StringBuffer translateVariable(Operator op)

      • translateFunc

        protected final StringBuffer translateFunc(Operator o,
                         ArrayList<StringBuffer> sub)
        translate a function.
        Parameters:
        o - the Operator used for this function.
        sub - The StringBuffers representing the arguments of this Function.
        Returns:
        a StringBuffer representing the complete Function.

                                 ArrayList<StringBuffer> sub)

        iterterm - The term used as third argument of the bsum function.
        Returns:

        s - the sort, this predicate belongs to.

      • translateTaclets

        private ArrayList<StringBuffer> translateTaclets(Services services,
                                       SMTSettings settings)
                                          throws IllegalFormulaException
        Translates the list tacletFormulae to the given syntax.
        Parameters:
        services - used for translateTerm
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException

      • translateComment

        protected StringBuffer translateComment(int newLines,
                            String comment)

      • getMaxNumber

        private long getMaxNumber()
        Returns the maximum number that is supported by the solver. This limit is only considered if hasNumberLimit returns true.

      • getMinNumber

        private long getMinNumber()
        Returns the minimum number that is supported by the solver. This limit is only considered if hasNumberLimit returns true.

      • hasNumberLimit

        private boolean hasNumberLimit()
        returns true if the format supports only integers within a certain interval.
